recent_excerpts: Cookeville Regional Medical Center confirms a 2025 ransomware attack by the Rhysida group compromised the data of 337,000 individuals after the theft of 500GB of files.

The UAC-0247 threat actor is actively targeting Ukrainian municipal healthcare and government bodies, deploying malware to steal browser data, WhatsApp sessions, and credentials while moving laterally
Dutch healthcare IT provider ChipSoft was hit by a ransomware attack, forcing it to take patient and provider portals offline, disrupting critical medical administration across the Netherlands.
